title: GreenLang Factors Source Registry v0.1 (Phase 1)
description: Phase 1 canonical contract for greenlang/factors/data/source_registry.yaml. Every source served by GreenLang Factors MUST validate against this schema. Adds the CTO Phase 1 mandatory fields: licence_class enum, redistribution_class enum, parser block, legal_signoff block, entitlement_rules, release_milestone, trust_tier. Existing optional fields from prior waves remain permitted via additionalProperties=true on each source object so the migration is incremental; the required-fields list is the binding gate.

source_id.description: Internal source slug. Lowercase + underscores; dots allowed for version-bearing Phase 3 source slugs (e.g. 'ecoinvent_3.10_cutoff', 'exiobase_v3.8.2'). Stable across versions.

urn.description: Canonical source URN per greenlang.factors.ontology.urn. Public id. Dots permitted in version-bearing Phase 3 URNs (e.g. 'urn:gl:source:ecoinvent-3.10-cutoff', 'urn:gl:source:exiobase-v3.8.2').

authority.description: Authoritative body that publishes the source (e.g. 'European Commission DG TAXUD', 'IPCC Task Force on National GHG Inventories', 'Central Electricity Authority, Government of India').

publisher.description: Legal entity that publishes the source (often same as authority).

licence_class.description: CTO Phase 1 licence class. community_open: free with attribution (e.g. EPA, DESNZ, IPCC, EU CBAM defaults, India CEA). method_only: framework/method text public; values restricted (PCAF, GHGP, GLEC, PACT). commercial_licensed: requires commercial licence (Ecoinvent, IEA, CEDA, EXIOBASE commercial). private_tenant_scoped: tenant-uploaded or tenant-private factors. connector_only: served via API/connector only, no bulk redistribution (Electricity Maps, EC3). blocked: cannot be ingested or served until reclassified. Phase 3 additions: cc-by-4.0 (open Creative-Commons sources e.g. EXIOBASE), ecoinvent-licensed (commercial ecoinvent licence), tenant_private (synonym of private_tenant_scoped retained for Phase 3 tenant packs).

licence.description: Pinned factor-record licence tag for this source. For any production v0.1 source this MUST be non-null and every published factor's `licence` field must match it. Future placeholder rows may keep this null until legal review pins the exact tag.

redistribution_class.description: Separate from licence_class. Specifies what can be returned to tenants. redistribution_allowed: values + metadata + bulk download. attribution_required: same but caller must surface attribution. metadata_only: list/describe but don't return values. derived_values_only: return our normalized derived values, not the raw upstream values. tenant_entitled_only: return only to tenants with an active entitlement record. no_redistribution: never return values, only describe existence. blocked: never return at all.

cadence.description: Publication cadence of the upstream source. Phase 3 addition: on_event (synonym of event_driven for webhook-driven sources).

source_owner.description: Internal accountable role for this source (e.g. 'climate-methodology-lead', 'data-engineering-lead'). Maps to a row in operating-model/OPERATING_MODEL.md.

module.description: Dotted Python import path of the parser module.

function.description: Parser function or class name. Phase 3 introduces class-based runner-dispatch parsers (e.g. 'Phase3PactApiParser'); legacy alpha parsers remain snake_case functions ('parse_epa_ghg_hub').

owner.description: Optional parser-specific owner override (defaults to source_owner).

trust_tier.description: Independent of licence_class. regulator_approved: published by a national/regional regulator and accepted as-is for compliance reporting. external_verified: peer-reviewed methodology (IPCC, GHGP, ISO 14083). community_curated: curated by GreenLang from public sources. experimental: not yet ready for compliance use. Phase 3 addition: tenant_supplied (private factor packs uploaded by tenants).

reviewed_by.description: Compliance/Security Lead identity (e.g. 'human:legal@greenlang.io'). Null only when status=pending_legal_review.

reviewed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of legal review. Null only when status=pending_legal_review.

evidence_uri.description: Pointer to the legal-vault evidence (signed PDF, internal counsel memo, source licence page snapshot). Null only when status=pending_legal_review.

expires_at.description: Optional expiry; required when the legal review is time-bound (e.g. annual licence renewal).

latest_source_version.description: Most recent upstream publication version we have ingested (e.g. '2024.1', '20.0', 'AR6', 'v3.0'). Schema policy (Phase 1): MAY be null for placeholder rows whose `release_milestone` is later than v0.1 (i.e. not yet wired). MUST be non-null for any row with `release_milestone == 'v0.1'`. The CI test `test_v0_1_sources_have_freshness_metadata` enforces this row-level rule that JSON Schema cannot express.

latest_ingestion_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 of the most recent successful ingest. Schema policy (Phase 1): MAY be null for placeholders whose `release_milestone` is later than v0.1. MUST be non-null for `release_milestone == 'v0.1'`. The CI test `test_v0_1_sources_have_freshness_metadata` enforces this row-level rule.

publication_url.description: Stable upstream publication URL (regulator publication landing page, dataset DOI, etc.).

citation_text.description: Human-readable citation served alongside every factor from this source.

model.description: Which entitlement rule the SourceRightsService enforces. public_no_entitlement: no check (community_open). tenant_entitlement_required: tenant must have an active EntitlementRecord. private_tenant_owner_only: only the owning tenant may read. connector_only_no_bulk: served via connector path only; bulk download blocked. blocked: deny everything.

required_pack_sku.description: Optional. When set, the tenant must hold this pack SKU in greenlang/factors/entitlements.py (existing pack-SKU entitlement).

metadata_visibility.description: What level of source METADATA (display_name, citation, etc.) is visible. Independent of value visibility.

release_milestone.description: Which release this source is scoped to per the roadmap. Sources with release_milestone > current release MUST NOT be ingested in production.

aliases.description: Optional alternate source_ids (legacy or alpha-spec aliases).

jurisdiction.description: Geographies this source covers. Array of ISO-3166 country codes or sub-national codes; or 'GLOBAL'.

watch.description: Source-watch config (mechanism + url) for change detection.
